description: A merge conflict has occurred in the 'TailwindTraders-Api' repository. A pull request attempting to add retry logic conflicts with a recent update to the API endpoint URL on the main branch. Resolve the merge conflict in 'appsettings.json' for Pull Request #1 by ensuring the final configuration includes both the v2 API endpoint from the main branch and the RetryPolicy configuration from the feature branch. Complete the merge of the pull request into the main branch.
